I have all the data needed. The example files at lines 202 and 102 are pattern-matches (`find_map`/`if let`), not constructors. Line 70 of tool_enforcement.rs is also a destructure inside `match`. Only lines 273 and 92 construct the value.

## A. PolicyDenial constructors

- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/agent_loop.rs` (line 273): The `AgentLoop` itself constructs and emits a `PolicyDenial` when its own allowlist check rejects a requested tool before dispatching it.
- `crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/tool_enforcement.rs` (line 92): `EnforcedAuditSink::emit` synthesizes a `PolicyDenial` when it observes a `ToolCallRequested` for a tool not in the allowlist — this is the "bypass" path that catches denials that the loop's own check missed.

- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/audit/mod.rs`: `NullSink`
- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/audit/mod.rs`: `InMemorySink`
- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/audit/mod.rs`: `JsonlFileSink`
- `crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/tool_enforcement.rs`: `EnforcedAuditSink`
